updates.title: GPT-5.5 and Codex app updates
updates.summary: GPT-5.5 became available in Codex for complex coding, computer use, knowledge work, and research workflows. The Codex app also added browser use for local and file-backed pages plus automatic approval reviews.
updates.when_to_use: Use this when you want a stronger model for implementation, refactors, debugging, testing, validation, or knowledge work, or when Codex needs to exercise a rendered UI and route approval prompts through a reviewer.

updates.title: Codex can now help with more of your work
updates.summary: The Codex app expanded into a broader AI workspace with less setup, browser-based verification, computer use for macOS app workflows, richer outputs, and better continuity across longer-running tasks.
updates.when_to_use: Use this when a task needs Codex to inspect a running app, comment on a rendered page, operate desktop UI flows, or produce richer artifacts from files and screenshots.

updates.title: Codex model availability update
updates.summary: Codex model availability was updated across Codex surfaces, making it easier to discover and select the appropriate model and workflow from the CLI, app, and related product surfaces.
updates.when_to_use: Use this when you are choosing which Codex surface or model to start with and want the local CLI and Codex app model picker behavior to match the current rollout.

updates.title: Build and install plugins in Codex
updates.summary: Codex added plugins: installable bundles that package skills, app integrations, and MCP server configuration for reusable workflows across the Codex app, CLI, and IDE extensions.
updates.when_to_use: Use this when you want to package repeatable Codex workflows as skills, app integrations, MCP configuration, or repo-local plugins that teammates can install.
